$schema.description: The JSON Schema version used for validation.

architecture.description: The architecture of the model, represented as an array of integers.

epoch.description: The epoch number at which the model was saved.

name.description: The name of the display model.

last_updated.description: The date when the model was last updated, in the format YYYY_MM_DD.

activation.description: The activation function used in the model.

files.description: A list of files associated with the model.
